message:
fix: replace as casts with try_from, inline format args, simplify raw strings

Address clippy::cast_possible_truncation by replacing as u8, as u16,
and as usize casts with try_from().expect() in test helpers across
ffs-btrfs, ffs-mvcc (wal_replay, wal_writer, crash_matrix). Inline
format string arguments in ffs-harness error_taxonomy and ffs-mvcc
crash_matrix. Replace r#"..."# with r"..." where no escapes are needed
in ffs-harness btrfs_capability_drift. Add numeric underscore separators
to large literals.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
